_note: Original, owned NET board messages — our prose, era of Count Binary.

messages.body: Weekly reminder: a 'wilson' is a cowboy who screws up bigger than his talent. Named for a guy. Don't be the guy. This has been Wilson Watch.
Your handle registered 6 weeks ago. Runs logged: 1. Survival rate: statistically impossible. The board doesn't know whether to congratulate you or study you.

Multiple long-haul jockeys report structured presences past the industrial sectors — icons that don't map to any registered AI, answering to names out of vodou. Before you write in: yes, we've heard the one about the crossroads. Everyone's heard the one about the crossroads.

Collectors: an unknown artist's assemblage boxes are moving through Paris and Brussels at prices that would embarrass a Cornell. No provenance, no maker, no gallery. The last buyer's agent paid in untraceable estate credit and asked zero questions. Must be nice.
The item you flight-tested woke something that has since retained counsel, so to speak. Suggest your organization review who, precisely, was watching the watchers. — F.
The club is OPEN. Ignore anything you heard about this week. First drink half price for anyone who can name all twelve dead escalators in order.
